name: RTOS
specification:
RTOS team git message convention:
- Type prefixes: feat, fix, docs, style, refactor, test, chore, perf
- Optional scope in parentheses
- Subject: imperative mood, no period, max 72 chars
- Body: wrap at 80 chars, explain what and why
- Must include DST (Design Specification) or AR (Action Request) reference
- Signed-off-by trailer required

Example:
feat(timer): add high-resolution timer support

Implement microsecond-precision timer for real-time scheduling.
This enables sub-millisecond task scheduling required for
motor control applications.

DST: RT-2024-015
Signed-off-by: John Doe <john@company.com>
